title: sida angustifolia
intro: Sida angustifolia, also known as the narrowleaf sida, is a plant species in the mallow family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sida angustifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Sida angustifolia is often used as a tea or infusion, or dried and made into a powder for capsules or tinctures.
